# Pull Request Template

## Summary

Describe your changes clearly.

## Why this matters

Explain the value for students/community.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New resource
- [ ] Fix (typo/link/format)
- [ ] New guide content

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested links and formatting
- [ ] I kept language beginner-friendly
- [ ] I followed contribution guidelines
